assignments.name: Assign_account_contact_relation_to_collection
assignments.label: Assign account contact relation to collection

assignments.name: Assign_Funding_Award_Participant_Values_to_Existing
assignments.label: Assign Funding Award Participant Values to Existing

assignments.name: Assign_New_Details_for_Existing_Contact_Found
assignments.label: Assign New Details for Existing Contact Found

decisions.name: Check_to_Create_New_contact_with_Existing_Details
decisions.label: Check to Create New contact with Existing Details

Flow.description: Allows the adding of Grant Recipient so that they can be added and removed from the funding award as a Grant Recipient Lead

formulas.name: flaBaseUsername
formulas.expression: LOWER(LEFT({!First_Name}, FIND('.', {!First_Name} & '.') - 1)) & "." & LOWER(LEFT({!Last_Name}, FIND('.', {!Last_Name} & '.') - 1)) & "." & LOWER({!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Funding_Award_Acronym__c}) & RIGHT({!Email.value}, LEN({!Email.value}) - FIND('@', {!Email.value}) + 1)

formulas.name: flaNewUsernamePlusAccount
formulas.expression: LOWER(SUBSTITUTE(LEFT({!First_Name}, FIND('.', {!First_Name} & '.') - 1), " ", "")) & "." & LOWER(SUBSTITUTE(LEFT({!Last_Name}, FIND('.', {!Last_Name} & '.') - 1), " ", "")) & "." & LOWER(SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE({!Get_Current_Funding_Award.FundingOpportunity.Funding_Scheme_Acronym__c}, " ", ""), ":", "")) & LOWER(SUBSTITUTE({!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Funding_Award_Acronym__c}, " ", "")) & SUBSTITUTE(RIGHT({!Email.value}, LEN({!Email.value}) - FIND('@', {!Email.value}) + 1), " ", "")

Flow.label: DESNZ - Manage GR User

recordCreates.name: Create_Contact_for_GR_Portal_User
recordCreates.label: Create Contact for GR Portal User

recordLookups.name: Get_all_accounts_on_the_funding_award
recordLookups.label: Get all accounts on the funding award

recordLookups.name: Get_Existing_User_Record_to_Remove
recordLookups.label: Get Existing User Record to Remove

recordLookups.name: Get_Participant_Role_Id_for_Existing
recordLookups.label: Get Participant Role Id for Existing

value.stringValue: DESNZ - Warm Homes GR Community Plus Login User

recordLookups.name: Get_Selected_GR_Funding_Award_Participant_Record
recordLookups.label: Get Selected GR Funding Award Participant Record

fields.name: Confirm_Existing_Participant
fields.fieldText:
Confirm the Grant Recipient to be added to the Funding Award:


Participant Role: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.ParticipantRole.MasterLabel}

Participant: {!varFirstName} {!varLastName}

Participant Account: {!varAccountName}



Funding Award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Name}

Funding Scheme: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.FundingOpportunity.Name}

fields.name: Confirm_Funding_Award_Participant
fields.fieldText:
The Grant Recipient has been created and added to the Funding Award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Name}


New User Details

Name: {!Get_New_User.Name}

Username: {!Get_New_User.Username}

Email: {!Get_New_User.Email}



Participant Details

Participant Role: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.ParticipantRole.MasterLabel}

Participant: {!rcdNewUser.FirstName} {!rcdNewUser.LastName}

Account: {!varAccountName}

fields.name: Add_GR_Details
fields.fieldText: Portal User Contact Details

fields.name: First_Name
fields.fieldText: First Name

fields.name: Last_Name
fields.fieldText: Last Name

fields.name: Portal_Role
fields.fieldText: Portal Role

fields.name: Title
fields.fieldText: Job Title

fields.name: Confirm_message
fields.fieldText: The new user has been created successfully

fields.name: New_User_Details
fields.fieldText:
These are the proposed new user details


Name: {!rcdNewUser.FirstName} {!rcdNewUser.LastName}

Username: {!flaNewUsernamePlusAccount}

Email: {!Email.value}

Current Funding Award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Awardee.Name}

Title: {!rcdNewUser.Title}

Company Name: {!rcdNewUser.CompanyName}

Portal Role: {!rcdNewUser.Portal_Role__c}

Scheme: {!rcdNewUser.Portal_Scheme__c}

Contact Id: {!varContactId}

screens.name: Confirm_Removal_of_Existing_Funding_Award_Participant
screens.label: Confirm Removal of Existing Funding Award Participant

fields.name: Confirms_Removal_GR_Participant
fields.fieldText:
Confirm the Funding Award Participant to be removed from the funding award:﻿


Participant: {!varExistingUser.Contact.FirstName} {!varExistingUser.Contact.LastName}

fields.name: FundingAwardParticipantRemoved
fields.fieldText: The Grant Recipient has been successfully removed from the funding award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Name}

fields.name: Fault_message
fields.fieldText: A new contact record has not been created because there is a duplicate.

screens.name: Copy_1_of_Participant_Exists_for_Award
screens.label: Copy 1 of Participant Exists for Award

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Cannot_Add_Existing_user
fields.fieldText:
There has been an issue with adding the participant user so cannot be added


Participant Name: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.Related_User__c}

Participant Role: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.Participant_Role_Name__c}

Account: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.Related_Account__r.Name}

User Id: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.ParticipantId}

fields.name: Existing_GR_Participants
fields.fieldText: Existing Grant Recipients

fields.name: Existing_GR_Participants_text
fields.fieldText: Choose an option below to manage the Grant Recipient users listed (if any already exist)

fields.name: Choose_Item_to_Edit
fields.fieldText: Choose Item to Edit

fields.name: Do_not_create_message
fields.fieldText: A new contact has not been created.

fields.name: DuplicateContact_message
fields.fieldText:
The Contact details provided already exist


Name: {!varExistingContact.Name}

Account: {!varExistingContact.Account.Name}

Email: {!varExistingContact.Email}

Phone: {!varExistingContact.Phone}

Title: {!varExistingContact.Title}

fields.name: Choice_Text
fields.fieldText:
Would you like to continue and create the contact for this Funding Award with these details?

﻿Funding Award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Awardee.Name}


Name: {!varFirstName} {!varLastName}

Account: {!varAccountName}

Email: {!varEmail}

Phone: {!varPhone}

Title: {!varJobTitle}

Portal Role: {!varPortalRole}

fields.name: Choose_to_Create_new_Contact
fields.fieldText: Choose to Create new Contact

fields.name: ExistingFundingAwardParticipantAdded
fields.fieldText: The Grant Recipient has been successfully added to the funding award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Name}

fields.name: Contact_details_message
fields.fieldText:
These are the new contact details


Name: {!varFirstName} {!varLastName}

Participant Account: {!varAccountName}

Email: {!varEmail}

Phone: {!varPhone}

Current Funding Award: {!Get_Current_Funding_Award.Awardee.Name}

Title: {!varJobTitle}

Portal Role: {!varPortalRole}

fields.name: Cannot_Add_Existing_user
fields.fieldText:
This user already exists against this Funding Award so cannot be added


Participant Name: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.Related_User__c}

Participant Role: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.Participant_Role_Name__c}

Account: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.Related_Account__r.Name}

User Id: {!rcdFundingWardParticipant.ParticipantId}

fields.name: Select_Grant_Recipient_to_Remove
fields.fieldText: Select Grant Recipient to Remove

fields.name: User_Already_Exists
fields.fieldText:
The user record you are trying to create already exists, would you like to Activate them again for this project?


Name: {!varExistingUser.FirstName} {!varExistingUser.LastName}

Username: {!varExistingUser.Username}

Email: {!varExistingUser.Email}

Account: {!varExistingUser.CompanyName}

Title: {!varExistingUser.Title}

Active: {!varExistingUser.IsActive}

Portal Role: {!varExistingUser.Portal_Role__c}

Portal Scheme: {!varExistingUser.Portal_Scheme__c}

fields.name: Unique_Messsage
fields.fieldText: The Username is not Unique, this is made up of First Name and Last Name plus the Acronym for the Award. Pease provide a First and Last Name that will make it unique
